data.title: ASSYSTEM: H1 2026 consolidated revenue
data.description: In the first half of 2026, the company's total revenue amounted to €328.5 million, showing a 2.5% increase on an organic basis. The nuclear sector experienced significant growth, with an 8.0% increase in organic revenue during the same period, indicating a strong performance in this area.

data.title: Agentic AI Reshapes Property, Casualty Insurance Operations
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, Property and casualty insurers globally are restructuring operations to incorporate AI-powered decision workflows and flexible operating models, as reported by ISG. This shift reflects a trend towards embracing advanced technologies to enhance efficiency and adaptability.

data.title: Alignment Engine to Bring Power- and Cooling-Efficient AMD Helios AI Infrastructure to Ohio in 2027
data.description: An innovative company, Alignment Engine, announced its plan to implement the AMD Helios rackscale solution in their Ohio data center from 2027 onwards. The solution will be powered by AMD Instinct™ MI455X GPUs. This decision was primarily based on the solution's focus on power and cooling efficiency. Alignment Engine emphasized the importance of this efficiency in developing AI infrastructure that benefits both their customers and the environment.

data.title: UPDATE - Omada Health to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Conference Call on August 6, 2026
data.description: Omada Health is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2026 on Thursday, August 6, 2026, following the close of the market.

data.title: Red Cat and C3A Advance Black Widow™ Integration into OBERON-Enabled Fires Networks
data.description: The integration of technology enhances the effectiveness of Black Widow as an ISR sensor in tactical fires structures. This collaboration reinforces Black Widow's position as a crucial forward ISR sensor.

data.title: C&F Financial Corporation Announces Net Income for Second Quarter and First Six Months
data.description: In Toano, Virginia on July 23, 2026, C&F Financial Corporation, the parent company of C&F Bank, disclosed a consolidated net income of $8.6 million for the second quarter of 2026, marking an 11.1% rise from $7.8 million achieved in the same period in 2025. Furthermore, the Corporation announced a consolidated net income of $15.4 million for the initial half of 2026, presenting a 17.2% increase from $13.2 million recorded in the first half of 2025.
